themes_list.theme: : Python Programming Fundamentals: Syntax Data Structures Control Flow
: Core Concepts of Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL)
: NumPy and Pandas for Data Manipulation
: Introduction to Scikit Learn for ML Algorithms
: Basic concepts of Docker for Containerization

information_resources.resource: : Official Python documentation and interactive tutorials (e.e. Python Crash Course)
: Coursera or ed X courses on Machine Learning Fundamentals (e.e. Andrew Ng courses)
: Pandas documentation and DataCamp tutorials for data wrangling and analysis}
: Docker official documentation and tutorials for basic container setup}

themes_list.theme: : Advanced Python for Data Science (Object Oriented Programming and efficient scripting)
: Implementing ML Models using Scikit Learn (Classification and Regression)
: Building Data Pipelines with Pandas for ETL operations
: Containerizing ML Models using Docker (Creating Dockerfiles and running containers)
: Introduction to Kubernetes for Orchestration (Basic concepts for deploying ML services)

information_resources.resource: : Kaggle datasets for hands on ML problems and competitions}
: Scikit Learn user guides and tutorials focusing on model training and evaluation}
: Tutorials on Pandas for complex data cleaning and feature engineering}
: Docker tutorials covering multi‑stage builds and environment setup}

themes_list.theme: : End to End ML Model Deployment Pipeline
: Data Ingestion and Preprocessing using Python and Pandas
: Model Training and Evaluation using Scikit Learn
: Containerization of the Trained Model using Docker
: Deployment Simulation using basic Kubernetes concepts

information_resources.resource: : A complex dataset from Kaggle or a real business problem}
: GitHub repository for all code and Dockerfiles}
: A simple deployment script or documentation showing how Docker and Kubernetes interact with the model}
